534 O0400F1_RCRTNL_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400F1_RCRTNL_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400F1 Recreational Therapy Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that recreational therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
